Class TenantResource

java.lang.Object

grafiosch.integration.rest.TenantResource

    • createManagedClientTenant

      protected Integer createManagedClientTenant(String tenantName, User advisor)
      Description copied from class: TenantBaseResource
      Creates and persists the concrete tenant for a managed client and returns its id. The concrete tenant type and its currency are application-specific (the library only knows the TenantBase mapped superclass), so the application supplies the implementation (typically using the advisor's own tenant currency).
      Specified by:
      createManagedClientTenant in class TenantBaseResource<Tenant>
      Parameters:
      tenantName - the name for the new tenant
      advisor - the advisor creating the client
      Returns:
      the id of the newly created tenant

    • getManagedTenantName

      protected String getManagedTenantName(Integer idTenant)
      Description copied from class: TenantBaseResource
      Returns the display name of a tenant by id, or null if it does not exist. The application supplies this because the concrete tenant repository is application-specific.
      Specified by:
      getManagedTenantName in class TenantBaseResource<Tenant>
      Parameters:
      idTenant - the tenant id
      Returns:
      the tenant name, or null
